desc: Fix the off-by-one bug in `separatorLine` inside the large file src/table.ts. Each column's dash run is built with `(widths[c] ?? 0) + 1` instead of `+ 2`, so every column's separator is one dash short and the separator line no longer matches the column width plus its two padding spaces. Edit only the faulty function so tests/table.test.ts passes. The other modules already pass.
